problem: Healthcare systems globally need AI solutions for accelerating tuberculosis screening, lung cancer early detection, stroke care coordination, and other critical diagnostic pathways especially in underserved communities
solution: World's most adopted healthcare AI platform with 105+ countries and 5200+ sites - offering WHO-evaluated AI for TB/pediatric TB screening, end-to-end lung cancer care continuum, and AI-powered stroke care coordination suite with FDA-cleared chest X-ray algorithms
